## beehiiv referral-program get

Show the referral program

### Synopsis

Get referral program

Retrieve details about the publication's referral program, including milestones and rewards.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/referral_program

```
beehiiv referral-program get [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv referral-program get
beehiiv referrals show
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for get
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
